items.headline: Lithium Is on the Rise Again. Does That Make Albemarle a Buy?
items.snippet: Albemarle paid down large debt in Q1. Lithium miner tightening expenses. Q1 sales +33% YoY. Chinese spot lithium prices rebounded to $23/kg from $10/kg low. BESS demand new catalyst, output projected +35% YoY. Analysts project 4% global lithium supply deficit for 2026.

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond EVs
items.snippet: BESS demand driver growing alongside EVs. Lithium market supply deficit persisting. Grid energy storage more evenly distributed globally, a very interesting demand driver per Albemarle CCO Eric Norris.

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand - Citi upgrade to Buy
items.snippet: Citi upgrades ALB from High Risk to Buy, maintains $225 target price. ESS battery output forecast to reach 950 GWh in 2026, +35% YoY, expanding to 1,300 GWh by 2027. Market underestimating Albemarle growth potential despite spot lithium price weakness.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: RBC Capital Markets reiterates Outperform on ALB, raises price target to $257 from $253. Expects 2026 and 2027 EBITDA of $2.8B and $2.9B respectively. Lithium supply expected to remain tight through 2027.
